metaDescription: Browse Namefi domain NFTs currently listed for sale on OpenSea. Every listing is a real onchain, ICANN-accredited domain you can buy and own.
title: Marketplace
buyDialogDescription: Complete your purchase from your connected wallet — you'll confirm the exact total in your wallet before anything is sent.
buyDialogFeeNote: Marketplace and network fees are added at checkout. Your wallet shows the final total before you confirm.
buyToastRateLimited: OpenSea is briefly rate-limiting requests. Please try again in a moment.
etherSymbolTooltip: Ξ is the symbol for ether (ETH).
partialLoadNote: Some listings may be missing — one or more marketplaces could not be reached.
emptyDescription: There are no Namefi domains listed on OpenSea right now. Check back soon.
loadFailedDescription: We couldn't reach OpenSea to fetch listings. Please try again in a moment.
